entries.text: USDT supply is $188.96B while the biggest yield pool, Lido STETH, holds $21.65B at 2.586% APY. That mismatch says tokenized dollars are expanding faster than high-grade onchain yield capacity.
VIX9D sits at 17.29 while VIX is 19.12 and 1.06% above its prior close. The front end of vol is quieter than the headline gauge, so traders still look wary without paying up for immediate panic.

Bitcoin's current hashrate is about 946.7 EH/s versus an 884.0 EH/s reading on the latest three-day average row. That 7% gap says production capacity is still pressing above the short-window mean, not rolling over.

Mempool's mining panel now shows current hashrate near 946.7 EH/s while the recent three-day row sits closer to 884 EH/s, and the same dashboard still points to a -4.27% difficulty reset ahead. That is a useful production-side snapshot because it combines high current commitment with an easing retarget, which is not the profile of a network under acute stress.
